message:
fix(alerts): clone context maps, stabilize ordering, and preserve unmanaged sources

Tracker getters (GetActive, GetActiveFiltered, GetAll, GetByID, GetResolved) now
return deep-cloned Alert values so callers cannot mutate internal state through
shared Context maps. Incoming alerts via AddAlert and Update are likewise cloned
on ingestion.

All getter methods now return alerts in deterministic order (CreatedAt, then ID,
then Type, then Session) instead of random map iteration order, which fixes
flaky dashboard rendering.

Extracted refreshAlert() to deduplicate the alert-update logic between Update()
and AddAlert(), propagating Message, Source, Session, Pane, and BeadID on refresh.

CompactionEventOutput.TokensReclaimed is now only set for successful completions
to avoid misleading values on error paths.

Rotation emit functions use rotatingAgentID() to prefer OldAgentID with fallback
to AgentID, fixing alert ID mismatches that prevented started-alert resolution.

GenerateAndTrack preserves event-based alert sources (context_rotation,
context_compaction) that the generator does not own, preventing them from being
incorrectly resolved as stale on each cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,19 +132,22 @@ type CompactionEventOutput struct {
 
 // NewCompactionEventOutput creates a CompactionEventOutput for robot mode JSON.
 func NewCompactionEventOutput(data CompactionAlertData, status string) CompactionEventOutput {
-	return CompactionEventOutput{
-		Type:            "context_compaction",
-		AgentID:         data.AgentID,
-		Method:          data.Method,
-		UsageBefore:     data.UsageBefore,
-		UsageAfter:      data.UsageAfter,
-		TokensBefore:    data.TokensBefore,
-		TokensAfter:     data.TokensAfter,
-		TokensReclaimed: data.TokensBefore - data.TokensAfter,
-		Status:          status,
-		Error:           data.Error,
-		DurationMs:      data.DurationMs,
-		GeneratedAt:     time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339),
-		SessionName:     data.Session,
+	output := CompactionEventOutput{
+		Type:         "context_compaction",
+		AgentID:      data.AgentID,
+		Method:       data.Method,
+		UsageBefore:  data.UsageBefore,
+		UsageAfter:   data.UsageAfter,
+		TokensBefore: data.TokensBefore,
+		TokensAfter:  data.TokensAfter,
+		Status:       status,
+		Error:        data.Error,
+		DurationMs:   data.DurationMs,
+		GeneratedAt:  time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339),
+		SessionName:  data.Session,
 	}
+	if status == "completed" && data.TokensBefore > data.TokensAfter {
+		output.TokensReclaimed = data.TokensBefore - data.TokensAfter
+	}
+	return output
 }
